body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'THE OPPORTUNITY'.

title.desc: A key statement or fact, e.g., 'The backbone of Vietnam's economy'.

subtitle.desc: Explanation of the statistic, e.g., 'operational businesses in Vietnam'.

subtitle_2.desc: Explanation of the statistic, e.g., 'of them are SMEs'.

subtitle_3.desc: Explanation of the statistic, e.g., 'of GDP, with 5M+ workers employed'.

subtitle_4.desc: Additional context or information, e.g., 'The backbone of Vietnam's economy — yet most can't access th'.

title_5.desc: A financial statistic or gap, e.g., '$24 Billion Funding Gap in Vietnam'.
